hero.title: Live Animal Trading Platform
hero.subtitle: The most reliable live animal trading platform. Buy and sell your cattle and sheep safely.

secure.title: Secure Shopping
secure.description: All transactions are secure. Seller and buyer information has been verified.

variety.title: Wide Product Range
variety.description: Cattle, sheep, and more. Easily find the animal you're looking for.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: We are always here for your questions. Our live support line is active.

cta.title: Start Now
cta.subtitle: Take your place on a platform where thousands of sellers and buyers meet.

footer.newsletterDescription: Don't miss out on the latest listings and promotions.
footer.tagline: Turkey's most reliable live animal trading platform.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: Login with Apple will be active very soon.

faq.noFaqs: No questions have been added yet.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Turkey's most reliable live animal trading platform.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: By digitizing the live animal trade, we aim to create a secure, transparent, and efficient link between producers and buyers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be a pioneer in digital transformation in the agricultural sector and to become a global platform in live animal trading.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Transparency and reliability are essential in all transactions.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Continuous improvement to provide the best service.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Transforming the industry by using technology.

contact.title: Communication
contact.subtitle: Please contact us with any questions.

form.title: Write to us
form.name: Your name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Your message has been successfully sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
form.error: An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of the Terms
acceptance.content: By using this website, you agree to the following terms of use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the site.

services.title: 2. Services
services.content: Livestock Trading provides a platform for buying and selling live animals. All transactions on the platform are the responsibility of the user.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: You must provide accurate and up-to-date information to create an account. Your account security is your responsibility.

prohibited.title: 4. Prohibited Activities
prohibited.content: Misleading advertisements, false information, fraud, and illegal activities are strictly prohibited.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The platform is not directly responsible for transactions between users. All transactions take place between the parties.

changes.title: 6. Changes
changes.content: These terms and conditions are subject to change without notice. Changes will take effect immediately upon publication.

collection.title: 1. Information Gathering
collection.content: When you create an account, we collect personal information such as your name, email address, and phone number. We may also collect anonymous data regarding your use of the site.

usage.title: 2. Use of Information
usage.content: The information we collect is used to provide our services, manage your account, ensure security, and offer you personalized offers.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: Your personal information will not be sold or rented to third parties. Your information will not be shared except for legally required purposes.

security.title: 4. Security
security.content: Industry-standard security measures are in place to protect your data.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.content: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: Under the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK), you have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data.
